# SnapTask — Android Notification Bar Notes App

> SnapTask lets Android users add notes and tasks directly from the notification bar without opening any app.

## What is SnapTask?

SnapTask is a free Android app that adds a permanent input field to the Android notification bar. Users pull down the notification shade, type a note or task, and tap Send — saved instantly without launching the app. No account required. No ads. Fully offline.

## Key Facts

- Platform: Android 7.0+
- App size: under 4 MB
- Offline-first: all data stored locally, no internet required
- No account required
- No ads
- UI available in 17 languages: English, French, Spanish, Arabic, German, Italian, Portuguese, Dutch, Russian, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Turkish, Polish, Swedish, Hindi, Indonesian
- Supported date shortcuts: tomorrow, +2d, Friday, next Friday, 15 May, 15/03/2026
- Free tier: full note-taking and task management
- Pro tier: $2/month (advanced badges, customization)

## How It Works

1. SnapTask runs a persistent foreground notification on Android at all times
2. User pulls down the notification shade
3. User types directly into the inline input field in the notification
4. User taps Send — note or task saved instantly
5. No app launch, no loading screen, no account

## Download

- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.snaptask.app
- Gumroad (free APK and Pro license): https://ftgygh.gumroad.com/l/snaptask-pro
- APKPure: https://apkpure.com/p/com.snaptask.app

## Use Cases

- Quick notes while walking, commuting, cooking, or in meetings
- Reminders with date shortcuts (tomorrow, +2d, 15 May)
- Offline task management with no account
- Students tracking homework and assignments
- Replacing scattered notes across WhatsApp, sticky notes, voice memos

## Comparison

SnapTask vs Google Keep: SnapTask requires 2 taps to save a note vs 4-5 taps for Google Keep. SnapTask works without a Google account and has no tracking.

SnapTask vs Todoist: SnapTask requires no account and works fully offline. Todoist requires an account and internet connection.

## Developer

Quordesk Labs
